package rulecoverage

func PositiveGormSelectMissingProjectionOnWideModel() string {
    ruleID := "gorm_select_missing_projection_on_wide_model"
    family := "data_access"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "GORM queries on wide models without a Select projection to limit fetched columns."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
